loop1.title: Voltage Live Health
loop1.note: Showing live phase voltages and deviation; Rate Change (V/min) is not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage history and deviation — sag/swell event counts are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Current History
loop1.note: Showing peak, average, and unbalance current from live logged columns; expected range lines omitted because the asset's rated current is unknown.
